sections.title: Galery
sections: Themadhood's Photo Gallery is a curated collection of visual works presented across a range of styles and formats. The gallery may include original photography, edited images, generated artwork, and other visual pieces, organized in a way that keeps related versions connected. Some entries present alternate formats or treatments of the same image, while others highlight distinct subjects or compositions, creating a gallery that is both flexible and visually consistent.

items.title: Pink Flower Set
about: A paired image set featuring the same floral subject presented in two related versions.
description: This set highlights variation in presentation rather than subject, with each image showing the same core floral design in a slightly different form.

items.title: Purple Spiral Flower Set
about: A paired image set featuring the same purple spiral floral image presented in two formats.
description: Both images are based on the same visual design, with the difference coming from format and presentation rather than changes to the subject itself.

items.title: White Spiral Flower Set
about: A paired image set featuring the same white spiral floral image presented in two formats.
description: This set keeps the same underlying image together while showing alternate presentation styles, allowing the format difference to be viewed as part of the piece.

items.title: Yellow Spiral Flower Set
about: A paired image set featuring the same yellow spiral floral image presented in two formats.
description: Both images share the same central design, with the variation coming from the file presentation and overall framing rather than the artwork itself.
